title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 159.19 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: EUR/USD
text: EUR/USD holding above 1.1697, with ECB rate at 2.00% and Fed at 3.75%; rate differential continues to weigh on EUR/USD.

title: CFTC — JPY
text: JPY net short positioning at 60,210 contracts, 34.8% long; potential for squeeze if sentiment reverses.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 21.2 signals normal volatility — risk regime remains stable.

title: Cross-Asset Correlation Break
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break: JPY no longer acting as safe haven, with corr=+0.685, z=+1.40σ.
